channel.title: La Cyber Sphère — Bulletin de veille cyber
channel.description: Alertes critiques et élevées, résumées et sourcées.

item.title: [Faible] Quatre rendez-vous cyber à suivre jusqu’en octobre
item.description: Barbhack, DEF CON, Cyberbrew et Hackfest rythment la rentrée cyber, de Toulon à Québec, en passant par Lille.

item.title: [Faible] Titan automatise le chantage aux données
item.description: Titan promet d’automatiser l’analyse des fuites, le calcul des rançons et la pression réglementaire.

item.title: [Faible] Certighost Exploit Lets Low-Privileged Active Directory Users Impersonate a Domain Controller
item.description:
Researchers H0j3n and Aniq Fakhrul published a working exploit on July 24 that lets a low-privileged Active Directory user obtain a certificate for a Domain Controller and authenticate as that machine.
They codenamed…

item.title: [Élevé] Chick-fil-A data breach affects more than 13,000 customers
item.description: Chick-fil-A has confirmed that over 13,000 customers had their accounts breached in a wave of credential stuffing attacks targeting its website and mobile app between June 17 and June 19. [...]

item.title: [Faible] Slopsquatting, Phantom Domains, and HalluSquatting Are the Same AI Attack
item.description: Slopsquatting, phantom squatting, and HalluSquatting all exploit the same late-binding attack pattern, where AI coding agents trust hallucinated package, repo, or domain names. ActiveState explains how pre-fetch…

item.title: [Faible] Un faux portail FPR pour piéger des pirates
item.description: Un faux portail FPR imitait la Police nationale pour enregistrer les recherches et identités de pirates.

item.title: [Faible] Europol flags 4,340 URLs for removal in 'The Com' crackdown
item.description: Europol has flagged 4,340 URLs for removal during a multi-week operation targeting online content linked to "The Com," a loosely organized network of nihilistic violent extremist groups. [...]

item.title: [Faible] B9 : 36 000 profils bancaires annoncés piratés
item.description: B9 fait l’objet d’une fuite présumée de 36 000 profils, illustrant les risques cyber des banques 100 % en ligne.

item.title: [Faible] Pokemon Gym : 19 600 comptes exposés
item.description: Fuite Pokemon Gym : 19 600 comptes de joueurs et joueuses, adresses IP et messages privés exposés.

item.title: [Critique] ChatGPT AgentForger Flaw Could Deploy Rogue Workspace Agents via a Phishing Link
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical vulnerability in OpenAI's ChatGPT Workspace Agents that could have allowed a single phishing link to stealthily build, authorize, and deploy an autonomous artificial…

item.title: [Faible] Bing Images Flaws Let Crafted SVGs Run Commands as SYSTEM on Microsoft's Servers
item.description:
A crafted SVG submitted to Bing's image search ran commands as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM on Microsoft's production image-processing workers, and as root on the Linux machines in the same fleet.
XBOW's testing got the same…

item.title: [Critique] Seeing AI Agents Is Not Enough. Security Teams Must Enforce What They Can Do
item.description: AI agent security is moving through a familiar maturity curve: adoption, then visibility, and finally, control. But what we've collectively discovered is that enforcing least privilege for AI agents is harder than we…

item.title: [Faible] Man gets six years for hacking 750 women's Snapchat accounts
item.description: An Illinois man was sentenced on Tuesday to 76 months in prison and three years of supervised release for hacking the Snapchat accounts of over 750 women to steal nude photos. [...]

item.title: [Faible] Motherless : les serveurs saisis au cœur de l’enquête
item.description: La police saisit les serveurs du site pour adultes Motherless dans une enquête européenne sur des contenus vidéos criminels.

item.title: [Faible] Hacker Runs Hermes AI Agent Unattended for Post-Exploitation at Thai Finance Ministry
item.description: Someone installed a popular AI assistant on a rented server, switched off the setting that makes it ask permission before running risky commands, and pointed it at Thailand's Ministry of Finance, which runs the…

item.title: [Faible] AI Hack : une fuite chez Darsa AI ?
item.description: Un pirate revendique une fuite chez Darsa AI et multiplie les publications visant des acteurs liés à l’Intelligence Artificielle.

item.title: [Faible] Golden Chickens Resurfaces With Four New Malware Families and Modular Implants
item.description: The threat actors behind the Golden Chickens malware-as-a-service (MaaS) ecosystem have resurfaced with four new malware families, indicating that the operators are showing no signs of stopping despite extensive public…

item.title: [Critique] NodeBB Patches Eight AI-Found Flaws Exposing Admin Access and Private Chats
item.description: Eight security flaws in NodeBB went public on Wednesday, along with the code to exploit them. Aikido Security rates all eight as high severity and says its AI pentest agents found them in a six-hour review of the forum…

item.title: [Critique] Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks
item.description: The Clop ransomware gang (also tracked as Cl0p) is targeting Internet-exposed PTC Windchill and FlexPLM instances in a new data theft extortion campaign. [...]

item.title: [Critique] Kimi K3 Agents Found Redis Zero-Days and Built RCE Exploit, Researchers Say
item.description:
Redis shipped seven security releases on July 23 after researchers published authenticated RCE PoCs for stock Redis 6.2.22, 7.4.9, 8.6.4, and 8.8.0.
All four chains require RESTORE. The Streams chains also need EVAL…

item.title: [Élevé] Fake Notepad++ Plugin Delivers MATCHBOIL.V2 in UAC-0099 Attacks
item.description:
The Computer Emergency Response Team of Ukraine (CERT-UA) has warned of a new campaign that involves the use of a malicious program that's dressed up as a Notepad++ plugin to compromise Windows systems.
The activity…

item.title: [Faible] New Dolphin X malware uses AI to rank high-value targets
item.description: A new Dolphin X remote access trojan claims to use an AI-powered profiling feature to score and rank infected users, helping cybercriminals identify which victims should be targeted first. [...]

item.title: [Élevé] Australian energy provider Origin says data breach exposes client data
item.description: Origin Energy has confirmed that an unauthorized party accessed and subsequently leaked customer data online, exposing sensitive personally identifiable information (PII), among others. [...]

item.title: [Faible] Fake Claude app promoted by Bing ads pushes SectopRAT malware
item.description: A malvertising campaign on the Bing search service is pushing a fake Claude desktop app installer hosted on a legitimate Claude.ai domain to deliver the SectopRAT malware. [...]

item.title: [Critique] Russian Espionage Group Exploited Zimbra Zero-Day to Steal Mail and 2FA Codes
item.description:
A Russian state-supported espionage group spent months reading Western mailboxes through a then-unknown flaw in Zimbra's webmail client.
The payload goes after the last 90 days of email, the organization's entire email…

item.title: [Faible] International alert spotlights Russia-linked attacks on Zimbra webmail
item.description: A Kremlin-backed group known as Laundry Bear has been using a zero-click phishing technique to break into Zimbra webmail accounts worldwide, the U.S. and other nations said.

item.title: [Moyen] Russian hackers exploit Zimbra zero-click flaw for email theft
item.description: CISA is warning that the Russian state-sponsored hacking group Laundry Bear, also known as Void Blizzard, is targeting organizations using Zimbra Collaboration email servers by combining phishing attacks with the…

item.title: [Faible] Hackers abuse Notepad++ plugins to stealthily install malware
item.description: Ukraine's CERT has uncovered attacks distributing an archive containing the legitimate Notepad++ application and a malicious utility called LunchPoke disguised as a plugin to establish persistence. [...]

item.title: [Faible] State Department imposes visa restrictions on foreign cyber scammers
item.description: Individuals connected to transnational cyber-scam operations face U.S. visa restrictions under a new policy announced by Secretary of State Marco Rubio.

item.title: [Faible] Microsoft 365 outage affects Teams, SharePoint and other services
item.description: Microsoft Teams and several Microsoft 365 services are experiencing an ongoing outage, with users reporting problems accessing Teams, SharePoint, Excel and the Microsoft 365 Admin Center. [...]
